## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Nate Mihalovich (Octane Lending) to discuss backgrounds, current roles, and potential opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nate's company was recently acquired by Octane Lending; he's exploring new sales tools and future opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) offers AI-driven content marketing services, growing rapidly with 25+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [fwd.digital focuses on scalable, AI-native content creation services ($9k/mo), publishing \~20M words/month](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Both parties open to future collaboration, depending on Octane's needs and fwd.digital's capacity](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

## Topics

### Personal Introductions and Locations

  - [Both based in Bay Area: Nate in Mill Valley, Marcel in Oakland Hills](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Brief discussion about local geography (retaining walls)](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

### Nate's Background and Current Situation

  - [Long-time sales leader, started a company 4 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Recently acquired by Octane Lending (unannounced "acqui-hire")](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Previous venture: marketplace for automotive, consumer-facing](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Currently at Octane, exploring new sales tools and potential next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### Marcel's Company: fwd.digital

  - [Started with workshops showcasing AI-driven content creation methods](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Rapidly grew from 2 to 25+ clients, with 25 more interested after recent announcement](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Services: $9k/month work streams, combining AI workflows with human editors/writers](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Publish \~20M words/month for clients, continuously improving systems based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on SEO-driven content, but offering comprehensive strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Content Creation Process and Scalability

  - [AI workflows adapted to client use cases, with editors and writers in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Handle strategy, execution, CMS integration, SEO audits, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Can produce 50-100k words/month per client, significantly more than traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Example: Building 30k pages for Hymns in a few months](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Business Model and Growth

  - [Content marketing industry: $430B/year, with $90B in tools](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [fwd.digital focusing on AI-native services, aiming for "software margins" in services](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Grew 50% last month, potential to double again with current pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Considering raising funds to support rapid hiring and scaling](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Timeline and Results

  - [Start publishing by week 3 of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Results vary based on client's domain authority and competitiveness of space](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Generally faster results than traditional SEO methods due to rapid content production](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to inquire internally at Octane about potential interest in fwd.digital's services](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Marcel to continue focusing on scaling operations to meet demand](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Both to stay in touch regarding potential future collaborations or opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Q4HPnigEmyhQB14KmCCe8GAywzgajBNS?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
